heroText: As a leading insurer in the trucking industry, we understand the importance of telematics and the data these systems can provide. As a Sentry insured, you may be able to earn up to a 5% discount on your insurance premium at time of bind by granting Sentry access to the information TruckerCloud collects through ELDs and dashcams. As a Sentry insured, you can use information collected to:
heroBullets: Help improve driver safety at your business
Conduct faster claim reporting and potential claim resolutions
Receive enhanced insights from our certified safety consultants
heroClosingText: By clicking on the link below and enrolling in our platform, you’ll be sharing your data with Sentry and agreeing to the terms of our Privacy Policy
supportText: For support onboarding your telematics account, please contact support@truckercloud.com or use the chat feature in the bottom right corner.
